summary: Criteria-committed, cross-family judged pairwise comparison between two idea nodes: commit the comparison criteria (sha256) before any advocacy, rebuild the judge input from validated anchored structure only (never verbatim author prose), collect a panel of at least three distinct model families, and write a pairwise_match_v1 artifact whose outcome enters the belief layer as one capped, non-eliminating observation.

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery.
install.kimi_code: Link into ~/.kimi-code/skills for Kimi Code discovery.
